niche: Revenue strategy consulting for founder-led service firms
targetAudience: Founders doing 500k to 3M in annual revenue who need stronger positioning and a more repeatable sales motion
offer: Fractional growth strategy and sales-system advisory
goals: Generate discovery calls, strengthen authority on LinkedIn, and turn strategic insight into trust-building content
keyThemes: Positioning clarity, offer packaging, sales process gaps, founder bottlenecks, high-leverage growth moves
extraContext: Primary channels are LinkedIn and Instagram. The offer is premium and consultative, so content should feel thoughtful instead of loud.
